title: MatchMind
subtitle: From event data to match-winning insight
description: A football intelligence platform that turns raw event feeds into practical coaching and scouting decisions.
storyHook: Coaches need answers quickly, not more dashboards. MatchMind compresses hours of manual analysis into fast, decision-ready outputs.
impact: Built to reduce analysis turnaround from hours to minutes for repeatable match workflows.

media.alt: MatchMind project cover with football analytics concept

title: Towards Simulation-to-Reality Transfer in EIT Tactile Sensing
subtitle: Teaching models to handle real-world sensor noise
description: A sim-to-real learning project that improves tactile sensing reliability by training models on realistic noise patterns before deployment.
storyHook: Real sensors are messy. This work explores how noise-aware training can make tactile ML systems more robust before they ever touch live hardware.
impact: Reduced dependence on expensive real-world data collection while improving transfer robustness.

media.alt: EIT Sim2Real project cover with tactile sensing visualization

title: AlphaScreen
subtitle: AI-assisted equity research workflow
description: A desktop research assistant that helps users screen, compare, and investigate global equities with explainable AI support.
storyHook: AlphaScreen is designed for fast conviction: less time wrestling fragmented data, more time validating investment hypotheses.
impact: Built to make multi-factor equity research workflows faster, clearer, and easier to repeat.

media.alt: AlphaScreen project cover with equity research interface concept
